perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black jacket and blue jeans, is running excitedly through a modern, brightly lit shopping mall. (2) She enters a toy and collectible store called 'LOCA' and looks at various statues, specifically focusing on a large wooden-style Guan Gong figure. (3) She talks directly to the camera while standing next to a very large cardboard box, gesturing with her hands. (4) She then carries the massive box, which is nearly as tall as her torso, through the mall hallway while laughing and smiling broadly. (5) Several other shoppers are visible in the background as she makes her way out with the large purchase.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic pop music plays throughout the entire video. (2) A female voice speaks with high energy and excitement, punctuated by occasional laughter. (3) A male voice is heard briefly off-camera, seemingly interacting with the woman. (4) Ambient mall sounds like distant chatter and footsteps are faintly audible beneath the music and main vocals.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '接到電話突然跑起來 到底發生什麼事' (Received a call and suddenly started running, what on earth happened?) - Hook text, curious tone. (2) '一路狂奔' (Running all the way) - Decorative text. (3) '妳老闆要買的' (Your boss wants to buy...) - Functional narration. (4) '公仔店?' (Toy store?) - Functional question. (5) '關公在此' (Guan Gong is here) - Decorative label. (6) '我的伴手禮 有點太大了' (My souvenir is a bit too big) - Decorative/Functional text. (7) '別人的老公都不會讓人失望' (Other people's husbands never disappoint) - Humorous hook text.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro running -> Entering shop -> Finding the item -> Carrying the large box out.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female character, 1 male staff member in the shop, and approximately 6 female passers-by in the mall hallways.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing an oversized black bomber jacket with white lettering, blue wide-leg jeans, and white sneakers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern shopping mall with white ceilings, exposed pipes, and various storefronts including Timberland and Comfiknit. The toy store 'LOCA' features glass display cases filled with figurines and bright LED screens.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by documenting a humorous and high-energy shopping trip where the creator buys an unexpectedly large souvenir (a Guan Gong statue) for her 'boss' or husband, emphasizing the scale of the box and the effort to move it.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy running intro and exaggerated reactions to the size of the purchase.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical variety-show style editing with large, colorful text overlays to emphasize comedic moments.
